title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited:
Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
